parameters.query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.display_name, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id, u.settings FROM users u WHERE u.is_active = true AND (u.settings->>'midday_pulse_enabled')::boolean IS NOT false
SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM holdings WHERE net_quantity > 0 UNION SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM alerts WHERE status = 'active'
